title: Security KB + Incident KB — Full-Text Search & Auto-Article Generation
description: test_security_kb.py and test_incident_kb_engine.py validate article CRUD, tag handling, LIKE-based search, and top-5 search term tracking. security_kb_router.py exposes the API. Gap: LIKE search is O(n) table scan without FTS5 index — performance degrades badly at scale. Auto-article generation from incident lessons learned is not implemented.
missing: FTS5 full-text search index: migrate security_kb and incident_kb article tables to use SQLite FTS5 virtual tables for sub-millisecond search
Auto-article generation from incidents: when incident_lessons_engine marks a lesson as 'implemented', auto-create a KB article from the lesson title, description, and remediation steps
KB article recommendation in alerts: when the SIEM triage queue shows an alert, surface top-3 relevant KB articles based on alert title similarity
